summary: Executed Tax Code list-level functional checks via Playwright CDP: Advanced Search controls, Refresh, Create->Cancel->Confirm return, profile dropdown, Download List, and Column Settings all ran without visible product error; row-action/filter-target selectors showed intermittent automation timeout caveat.
derived_updates: Tax Code list-level controls are operational for the executed scope on dev-energy.
Advanced Search modal supports Add Linear Filter, Add Filter Rules, Clear Filter, and Cancel in current UI.
Create Tax Code route opens and cancel confirmation flow returns safely to list page.
Row-level ACTION descendants and direct per-column filter trigger probes can intermittently timeout in automation and should use stronger selector/wait strategy before classifying product defects.
